item.title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Pipeline Operations at United States-Canada Border in North Dakota
item.description: This presidential permit grants Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership authorization to operate and maintain three existing pipeline facilities located at Pembina County, North Dakota, at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit is issued under the authority vested in the President of the United States and is subject to specified conditions. Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership is a limited partnership organized under Delaware law. The permit authorizes continued operation of the designated pipeline infrastructure at the international border location. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Pipelines (Southern Lights) L.L.C. to Operate and Maintain Pipeline Facilities at U.S.-Canada Border in North Dakota
item.description: This Presidential Permit grants Enbridge Pipelines (Southern Lights) L.L.C., a Delaware limited liability company, authorization to operate and maintain existing pipeline facilities located at the international boundary between the United States and Canada in Pembina County, North Dakota. The permit is issued subject to specified conditions and relies on the President's statutory authority to issue permits for such cross-border pipeline operations. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Pipeline Operations at U.S.-Canada Border in North Dakota
item.description: This Presidential Permit authorizes Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership, a Delaware limited partnership, to operate and maintain existing pipeline facilities located at Pembina County, North Dakota, at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit grants authority to the permittee to conduct specified pipeline operations subject to conditions outlined in the permit document. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Limited Partnership Pipeline Operations at United States-Canada Border
item.description: This presidential permit grants authorization to Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership, a Delaware limited partnership, to operate and maintain existing pipeline facilities located at the international boundary between the United States and Canada in Pembina County, North Dakota. The permit is issued pursuant to the President's constitutional authority and is subject to specified conditions outlined in the permit document. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Pipeline Operations at U.S.-Canada Border in North Dakota
item.description: This Presidential Permit authorizes Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership, a Delaware limited partnership, to operate and maintain existing pipeline facilities located at Pembina County, North Dakota, at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit grants authority to the permittee subject to specified conditions set forth in the document. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. item.title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Pipeline Operations at U.S.-Canada Border in Michigan
item.description: Presidential permit issued to Enbridge Energy, Limited Partnership, a Delaware limited partnership, authorizing the operation and maintenance of existing pipeline facilities located in St. Clair County, Michigan at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit grants authority pursuant to presidential powers and is subject to specified conditions set forth in the permit document. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Presidential Permit for Enbridge Energy Company to Operate International Pipeline Facilities at St. Clair County, Michigan
item.description: A presidential permit issued to Enbridge Energy Company, Inc., a Delaware corporation, authorizing the company to operate and maintain existing pipeline facilities located at the international boundary between the United States and Canada in St. Clair County, Michigan. The permit is subject to specified conditions outlined in the executive authorization. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Presidential Permit for Bakken Pipeline Company LP to Operate Pipeline Facilities at United States-Canada Border in North Dakota
item.description: This presidential permit grants authorization to Bakken Pipeline Company LP, a Delaware limited partnership, to operate and maintain existing pipeline infrastructure located at the international boundary between the United States and Canada in Burke County, North Dakota. The permit is issued under the authority vested in the President of the United States and is subject to specified conditions outlined in the document. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Presidential Permit for Bakken Pipeline Company LP Pipeline Construction at United States-Canada Border
item.description: A presidential permit issued to Bakken Pipeline Company LP, a Delaware limited partnership, authorizing the construction, connection, operation, and maintenance of pipeline facilities located at Burke County, North Dakota, at the international boundary between the United States and Canada. The permit is subject to specified conditions and is granted under the authority vested in the President of the United States. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.
